flows.title: Authentication Coverage
flows.description: Ensure non-public routes enforce caller identity checks.
flows.missing_description: Endpoint is missing reliable authentication guard coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Unauthorized callers may invoke protected operations.
flows.missing_fix: Apply authentication dependency, middleware, decorator, or wrapper guard.

flows.title: Authorization Coverage
flows.description: Ensure mutating non-public routes enforce role/scope/permission checks.
flows.missing_description: Endpoint is missing strong authorization checks.
flows.missing_impact: Authenticated but unauthorized actors may alter protected resources.
flows.missing_fix: Introduce role/scope policy checks via dependency, middleware, or service guard.

flows.title: Request Validation Coverage
flows.description: Ensure write routes validate incoming payloads.
flows.missing_description: Write endpoint lacks reliable request validation coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Malformed payloads can reach business logic and corrupt state.
flows.missing_fix: Use strict request DTOs or explicit validators before side effects.

flows.title: Response Contract Coverage
flows.description: Ensure routes return enforceable response contracts.
flows.missing_description: Endpoint response path lacks enforceable response contract safeguards.
flows.missing_impact: Client/back-end drift can produce unstable integration behavior.
flows.missing_fix: Define response models or explicit response serialization contracts.

flows.title: Error Handling Coverage
flows.missing_description: Endpoint lacks clear error handling coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Unhandled exceptions can return unstable or opaque failures.
flows.missing_fix: Add route-level or global exception handling with structured error payloads.

flows.title: Input Sanitization Coverage
flows.description: Ensure user input is sanitized before risky sinks.
flows.missing_description: Risky sink usage is not paired with clear sanitization signals.
flows.missing_impact: Unsanitized input may trigger injection or unsafe command execution.
flows.missing_fix: Sanitize/escape untrusted fields before SQL/template/command/file sinks.

flows.title: Secret and PII Protection
flows.description: Ensure sensitive fields are not exposed or logged without redaction.
flows.missing_description: Sensitive data handling lacks robust redaction/protection coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Secrets or PII may leak through API responses or logs.
flows.missing_fix: Mask, redact, or remove sensitive values in logs and responses.

flows.title: Rate Limit Coverage
flows.description: Ensure public/auth endpoints apply abuse throttling controls.
flows.missing_description: Abuse-prone route lacks clear rate-limit controls.
flows.missing_impact: Traffic spikes or credential stuffing can degrade availability/security.
flows.missing_fix: Add route or middleware throttling policy for public/auth endpoints.

flows.title: Audit and Trace Coverage
flows.description: Ensure sensitive operations are traceable through audit or request tracing.
flows.missing_description: Sensitive state-changing path lacks auditable trace coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Incident investigation and accountability become difficult.
flows.missing_fix: Emit structured audit logs with request/correlation identifiers.

flows.title: Idempotency and Transaction Safety
flows.description: Ensure high-risk mutating routes guard retries and partial side effects.
flows.missing_description: High-risk mutating endpoint lacks idempotency/transaction safeguards.
flows.missing_impact: Retries or partial failures can create duplicate or inconsistent state.
flows.missing_fix: Add idempotency keys and transaction boundaries for side-effect safety.
